summary: Completed testing of PDF and Excel export functionality for Monthly Reports. All features working correctly - PDF generation with 10 columns (not cut off), Excel export with proper formatting, both download buttons visible in UI.
seed_data_creation: Demo data auto-seeded with 3 campaigns and 60 days of entries each
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF and Excel export features fully tested and working. PDF uses landscape A4 with 10 columns (Date, Ad Spend, Ad+GST, Website, QR, Gateway, Revenue, Profit, Comm%, After%). Excel contains title, headers, data rows, totals, and summary section. Both download buttons visible in Monthly Reports page Export column.

details: Contains all 10 columns: Date, Ad Spend, Ad+GST, Website, QR, Gateway, Revenue, Profit, Comm%, After%
Contains TOTAL row and Summary section
Contains title section with campaign name and month
Contains all 10 columns with proper headers
Contains data rows with formatted values
Contains Summary section with Net Profit, Commission, After Commission, Ad Account Charges, Misc Expenses, Funds to Give
PDF download button (red icon) present for each report
Excel download button (green icon) present for each report
PDF download works - file downloads with .pdf extension
Excel download works - file downloads with .xlsx extension
Toast notification shows on successful download
